name: Sophos Central
description: Endpoint protection, EDR, and email security platform. Monitor endpoints, alerts, and security posture.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Sign in to Sophos Central at https://central.sophos.com
2. Go to Settings (gear icon) → API Credentials Management
3. Click 'Add Credential'
4. Enter a name (e.g. 'CompAI Integration')
5. For Role, select 'Service Principal ReadOnly'
6. Click Add — copy the Client ID and Client Secret immediately
7. Paste both values below

Note: You must copy the Client Secret right away — it cannot be retrieved later.

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Sophos Central → Settings → API Credentials Management. Create a credential with 'Service Principal ReadOnly' role.

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Shown once when you create the API credential. Copy it immediately.
